CustomField.formula: Speaker_Accomodation_Estimate__c + Speaker_Airfare_Estimate__c + Speaker_Honorarium_Estimate__c + Participation_Fee_Estimate__c + Booth_Construction_Estimate__c + Venue_Rental_Estimate__c + Equipment_Rental_Estimate__c + Workshop_Demo_Materials_Estimate__c + Promo_Materials_Estimate__c + Travelling_Accommodation_Estimate__c + Cost_Others_Estimate__c
CustomField.label: Total Estimated Cost
